description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a well-manicured hedge and featuring a private driveway leading to a covered carport. The house has a dark gable roof and a white exterior, with large windows and sliding glass doors that open onto a spacious backyard. The backyard includes a swimming pool, a wooden deck with outdoor seating, and several mature trees providing shade. The front yard is landscaped with shrubs and a small lawn, while the side yard features a patio area with an umbrella and outdoor furniture. The property is bordered by a sidewalk and a two-lane road, enhancing its urban residential context. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor living spaces and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor areas.
description: A modern white bungalow with a dark gable roof, large windows, a carport, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and deck. Surrounded by hedges and trees, it blends indoor and outdoor living in an urban setting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, carport, main entrance, and a glimpse of the backyard pool.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard pool, deck, and mature trees, with the house's back facade visible.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the patio area with umbrella, large windows, and the hedge-lined yard.
description_view_3: Opposite front view showing the carport, driveway, and the road, with the pool and deck visible in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
